This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Leigh's {STR} Generation effect +[Arg4]%. After playing Leigh's Command Card, gain {STR} equal to [Arg3]% of Leigh's ATK. This effect can increase by up to 200% based on current lost HP. Triggers up to 3 times per turn.
